parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({business_id:$json.business_id,generated_by:'campaign_simulator',category:'marketing',title:'Campaign simulation: '+$json.campaign_name,description:'Channel: '+$json.channel+' | Projected conversions: '+$json.projected_conversions+' | Revenue: $'+$json.projected_revenue+' | ROI: '+$json.roi_pct+'% | Verdict: '+$json.recommendation,priority:'normal',status:'pending',metadata:JSON.stringify($json)}) }}
